description_long: This object is a long-barreled firearm with a cylindrical suppressor or extended barrel attachment at the front, a black metal body, and a textured brown grip. The frame is sleek and streamlined, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The grip appears to be made of a textured material, likely wood or polymer, providing a secure hold. The overall design is modern, with clean lines and a matte finish on the metal surfaces. The object lacks any visible pump, lever, or break-action mechanism, and the barrel is singular and elongated.
description: A sleek, long-barreled shotgun with a cylindrical suppressor or extension, black metal body, and brown textured grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and cylindrical suppressor or barrel extension.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the black metal frame, and the brown textured grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the top of the frame, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the grip and barrel clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
